name: Kaede Ikeno
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Kaede is a student at Misato West High School, and also the class president. Her best friend is [Yuzu](https://anilist.co/character/87709/Yuzu-Iizuka). ~!Later in the manga it’s confirmed that Kaede has feelings for Yuzu.!~

name: Kaya Satou
description: An intelligent and righteous young girl. From a young age, Kaya understood the dangers of the dark beings residing in the far shore and will do whatever it takes to protect her family and friends. She usually maintains a stoic expression around her family and friends, but when she's fighting spectres, her demeanor shifts to one of intense bloodlust.

name: Keita Suminoe
description: Keita is a third-year junior-high school student studying for his high school entrance exams and although he is the younger brother, it is obvious he is the most mature of the three siblings. He wants to enter the same high school as his older twin step-sisters [Ako](https://anilist.co/character/8040) and [Riko](https://anilist.co/character/8041), and to do so must study hard while getting help from his sisters as well as he was originally planning on relying on his track running scholarship for

name: Kim Diehl
description: The partner and meister of [Jacqueline](https://anilist.co/character/14067/Jacqueline-O-Lantern-Dupre) and one of the top students in the EAT Class. She is the object of [Ox](https://anilist.co/character/14062/Ox-Ford)'s affections but she constantly turns him down. ~!She is later revealed to be a witch that fled from her homeland due to the discrimination she faced as a witch that did not fall victim to the destructive pull of magic, opting to hide her identity to become a meister at the DWMA.!

name: Kiri
description: __Species:__ Kitsune __Height:__ 147 cm The head attendant at Konohanatei. She has a relatively down-to-earth disposition.

name: Kokoro Hasegawa
description: __Height:__ 181 cm (5'11") A young aspiring, hard-working fashion designer, first-year student at the Geika Institute of Fashion, and part-time model at "Bon Rouge". She has a shy, submissive, and meek personality, and is rather self-conscious about her height, though she became less bothered by it when she was scouted in high school. name: Kudou
description: Makoto Edamura's former boss, now his partner-in-crime.

name: Kyosuke Kiryu
description: Kyosuke Kiryu is seen as one of Yusei Fudo's friends and he plays a major role in S2 [S1 Arc 2] in the Signer vs Dark Signer war. Prior to the 5D's timeline, Kiryu had been the leader of a legendary dueling team called Team Satisfaction, which consisted of Yusei Fudo, Jack Atlus, Crow Hogan, and himself as the founder and leader. name: Leona
description: Leona is the princess of Papnika. She is training to be a sage and is well-versed in the magic arts. Her country comes to near destruction after the return of Hadlar by the hands of Hyunkel, who she forgives and sentences to become a "true disciple of Avan." Her father is missing and presumed dead, leaving her in control of rebuilding her kingdom and helping in the fight against the Ultimate Demon King. name: Luou Mori
description: A shy 14-year-old boy, he is Miyako's cousin. The son of an American idol, he was abandoned by his mother following a scandal that exposed him as the son of her mother with another man who was not her husband. Raised by her strict, ballet obsessed grandmother, Luou grew under a physically and emotionally abusive environment with little to no contact with the outside world, learning only ballet. As a result, Luou has weak social skills, but his dancing prowess is unparalleled. Despite his tremend

name: Makie
description: Makie is a demon black guard that was ordered to protect Giuseppe Mayart.

name: Mammon
description: The Demon Lord of Greed who attempts to employ every opportunity to make a winning, specializing in real estates and the sale of home-brewed magical potions. Her greed is partially founded by the actions of her unnamed husband, who saddled her with 500,000 children and a load of debts on her shoulders.

name: Marianne
description: Miss Goldenweek (Miss April Fools Day in 4Kids' English dub) partnered with Mr. 3, a wax sculptor. She hates work, is a talented painter, and can be seen constantly eating her favorite snack: rice crackers. She also appears younger than the other Baroque Works agents. She wields Color Traps, which control a person's emotions or affect their fighting abilities by painting colors upon their body. Miss Goldenweek uses these Color Traps to control Luffy, attempting to prevent him from defeating Mr.

name: Mayumi
description: Mayumi is Irabu Ichirou's sullen-faced and sexy nurse. She seems to enjoy the Gothic Lolita fasion, as her nurse uniform seems to be fitted out with Lolita accessories.

name: Mika
description: __Height:__ 168 cm She tends to look down on people with courage, but she's sweet to obedient people. She answers various requests by saying "That's cute!".

name: Milkit
description: A shy girl with no magical powers, who is rescued by Flum from a slave trader. She insists on calling Flum her "Master". Her face is covered in bandages, with only a single blue eye peeking out. She carries a slave mark on her right cheek.

name: Minori Ichinose
description: Minori is an intelligent 2nd year middle school student who loves to read. She's an honor student with the best grades in her class. She has a poker face, so she struggles to show any emotions. However, she has a strong sense of self. She has loved the fairytale *The Little Mermaid* since she was a child, and she knows a lot of stories about mermaids. Cure Papaya is Minori's Pretty Cure alias and her charm point is her eyes.

name: Musashi Tomoe
description: The third pilot, he is an extremely hot-blooded young man and controls the Getter machine "Bear" and Getter-3. Musashi is short and fat, but also physically very strong as the leader of his prefecture's Judo team who has yet to be defeated in a match. Though he fails the physical and mental tests required to pilot Getter Robo, he makes up for it with hot-blooded spirit and stubbornness, becoming a valued member of the team.
